name: @layerzerolabs/common-utils-macro-tests-stellar-contracts
description: Compile-time test suite for the common-utils Stellar procedural macros

scripts.build: pnpm resolve-dependencies && pnpm exec lz-tool --script "cargo build" stellar
scripts.lint: pnpm resolve-dependencies && pnpm exec lz-tool --script "cargo clippy -- -D warnings" stellar
scripts.test: pnpm resolve-dependencies && pnpm exec lz-tool --script "cargo nextest run -E 'not test(/^ui_/)'" stellar
scripts.test:ui: pnpm resolve-dependencies && pnpm exec lz-tool --script "cargo nextest run -E 'test(/^ui_/)'" stellar
